title: Kazuhiko Shimamoto's Vampire-Idol Tagiru Manga Ends in 3 Chapters
content: This year's 18th issue of Shogakukan 's Weekly Shonen Sunday magazine announced on Wednesday Kazuhiko Shimamoto 's Vampire-Idol Tagiru manga will end in three chapters. Shimamoto's Vampire-Idol Tagiru manga tells the story of a passionate manga artist who writes a story about idols.
author: ANN

title: Dan Da Dan Manga Gets Stage Play
content: A new official website and X/Twitter account opened on Tuesday to announce that Yukinobu Tatsu 's DAN DA DAN "paranormal mystery battle & romantic comedy" manga is getting a stage play adaptation in Tokyo and Osaka this August and September. Imagine Ito of Umebо̄ is directing the play.
author: ANN

title: Major Fantasy Anime Hypes Season 2 With New Crunchyroll Streaming Release
content: A major action fantasy is coming back for Season 2 after two years, and Crunchyroll is getting ready for it in style with a new streaming release ahead of the new season’s premiere.
author: ComicBook

title: JoJo's Steel Ball Run to Stream 2nd STAGE Weekly in Fall 2026 Says Netflix
content: Netflix announced on X (formerly Twitter) on March 6 that STEEL BALL RUN: JoJo’s Bizarre Adventure will stream across “ a split-cour release across the entire run of episodes “, with the next set of episodes coming weekly in the fall of 2026.
author: Anime Corner

title: The Bugle Call: Song of War Manga Moves to Jump SQ. Rise
content: The May issue of Shueisha 's Jump SQ. magazine announced on Friday Mozuku Sora and Higoro Tōmori 's The Bugle Call: Song of War ( Sensō Kyōshitsu ) manga will end its serialization in the magazine and move to the seasonal Jump SQ. RISE magazine. Shueisha will publish the next chapter in the Summer issue in July.
author: ANN

title: Link! Like! Love Live! Game Ends Service
content: Sales of in-game currency have halted. Refunds for unused paid currency will be issued starting on June 30 until September 30. Link! Like! Love Live! launched in April 2023. Haruko Iizuka ( Little Busters , Horimiya ) designed the characters for the project. Odd No. Inc. publishes the game.
author: ANN

title: JoJo’s Bizarre Adventure: Steel Ball Run Confirms Netflix Release Schedule for 2nd Stage (& Explains the Long Wait)
content: Netflix has addressing the long wait for JoJo’s Bizarre Adventure: Steel Ball Run ‘s new episodes by confirming a promising release schedule for the 2nd Stage in a new update. JoJo’s Bizarre Adventure: Steel Ball Run was one of the most anticipated new anime releases of the Spring 2026 anime schedule as fans have been…
author: ComicBook

title: Tawawa on Monday Manga Takes 2-Month Break
content: This year's 18th issue of Kodansha 's Weekly Young Magazine announced on March 30 Kiseki Himura 's Tawawa on Monday ( Getsuyōbi no Tawawa ) manga is taking a break and will return to serialization in the 26th issue on May 25.
author: ANN

title: Japanese Animation TV Ranking, March 23-29
content: Detective Conan: The Private Eyes' Requiem , the 10th film in the Detective Conan franchise , aired on NTV on Friday, March 27 at 9:00 p.m., and it earned a 7.4% rating. The 2025 Eiga Oshiri Tantei: Star and Moon ( Butt Detective the Movie: Star and Moon) anime film aired on NHK Educational on Sunday, March 29 at 4:00…
author: ANN

title: Shonen Jump’s Most Unique Anime in Years Has Finally Arrived (& You Need to See It Now)
content: As Spring 2026 begins, a wave of new anime has already started rolling out this season. Dozens of series have premiered within just the past few days, including both brand-new titles and returning favorites with new seasons.
author: ComicBook
